factors.name: Calendar Event
factors.description: Scheduled events with 100% swing hit rate: Budget Day, FOMC, RBI MPC, Election Results, US CPI, F&O Expiry
factors.downgrade_conditions: VIX below 14 AND consensus probability above 90 percent reduces weight to 2-3

factors.name: Pending Resolution Event
factors.description: Named authority with publicly announced pending decision due within 12-24 hours with binary market outcome
factors.activation_conditions: Named authority PLUS specific timeframe PLUS binary outcome PLUS opposite directional impacts

factors.name: US Markets and Gift Nifty
factors.description: S&P 500 close best overnight gap predictor 60 percent of gaps. Gift Nifty at 8:30 AM accurate to 0.3 percent
factors.key_rule: S&P falls over 2 percent overnight India gaps down 1 to 1.5 percent at open 90 percent reliability

factors.name: Crude Oil Brent
factors.description: India imports 85 percent of oil. Every 10 dollar move equals 1.2 lakh crore annual import bill change
factors.elevated_triggers: Brent above 100 in conflict weight 8. Daily move above 3 percent weight 9. Brent above 110 weight 10

factors.name: FII Flow Trend
factors.description: NSE daily FII DII data. 5-day trend direction and acceleration
factors.r4_trigger: 7 or more consecutive days net selling above 3000 crore auto-sets weight to 9 and flags BEARISH

factors.name: Rupee Dollar Rate
factors.description: INR/USD current level and intraday direction
factors.key_rule: Rupee falls over 0.5 percent in single session Nifty falls same session near-perfect inverse

factors.name: India VIX Fear Index
factors.levels: Below 12 coiled spring. 12-18 normal. 18-25 elevated. Above 25 panic crash already priced bounce imminent. Above 30 extreme floor imminent

factors.name: Asian Markets
factors.key_rules: Nikkei fall above 2 percent India gap-down signal. Hang Seng fall above 2 percent China FII exit from India. Asian markets broadly up above 1 percent risk-on India follows

factors.name: European Markets
factors.description: FTSE DAX CAC. Primary use at 2:30 PM IST as real-time proxy for US session direction
factors.key_rule: DAX down above 1.5 percent at 2:30 PM IST US likely to open negative India gap-down tomorrow

factors.name: DII Counterbalance
factors.description: Domestic institutional investors buying on dips. SIP floor
factors.key_rule: DII heavy buying above 4000 crore slows crash speed but does not reverse direction. SIP inflows are mechanical floor

factors.name: 200-DMA Proximity
factors.description: Nifty within 2 percent of 200-day moving average is high sensitivity zone
factors.key_rule: Breaking below 200-DMA triggers algorithmic selling and FII stops. Bouncing off 200-DMA mechanical support buyers

factors.name: F&O Options Expiry Gamma
factors.description: Monthly expiry last Thursday. Amplifies existing trend 40-60 percent
factors.weight_scaling: Expiry day 9. 1-2 days before 7. 3-7 days before 5. More than 7 days 3

factors.name: Active Macro Regime
factors.description: Background multi-week theme that amplifies or mutes all other signals
factors.current: Iran war Hormuz blockade bearish India since February 28 2026
